summary: Completed testing of Support Rating System. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All rating UI components verified - RatingModal, star selection, comment input, submit flow, and admin RatingStatsPanel.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/rate-support requires auth (401)
✅ Backend: rate-support validates rating 1-5 range (400 for invalid)
✅ Backend: rate-support returns 404 for non-existent ticket
✅ Backend: Full rating flow - create ticket → resolve → rate (200)
✅ Backend: rate-support prevents duplicate rating (400)
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/my-pending-rating requires auth (401)
✅ Backend: my-pending-rating returns correct structure {ticket: ...}
✅ Backend: my-pending-rating finds resolved unrated tickets
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/admin/rating-stats requires auth (401)
✅ Backend: admin/rating-stats requires admin role (403)
✅ Backend: admin/rating-stats returns {average_rating, total_ratings, rating_distribution, recent_ratings}
✅ Backend: admin/rating-stats reflects new ratings correctly
✅ Backend: Rating without comment works (optional field)
✅ Frontend: Customer login successful
✅ Frontend: Chatbot toggle button (data-testid='chatbot-toggle') visible
✅ Frontend: RatingModal appears when user has pending rating ticket
✅ Frontend: RatingModal header 'قيّم تجربة الدعم' visible
✅ Frontend: 5 star buttons visible with data-testid='rating-star-{1-5}'
✅ Frontend: Star hover/click changes color to yellow-400
✅ Frontend: Rating text updates (سيء جداً → سيء → مقبول → جيد → ممتاز!)
✅ Frontend: Comment textarea visible with placeholder 'أضف تعليقاً (اختياري)...'
✅ Frontend: Submit button (data-testid='submit-rating-btn') visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: 'لاحقاً' (Later) button visible
✅ Frontend: Rating submission closes modal successfully
✅ Frontend: Admin panel 'تذاكر الدعم' tab accessible
✅ Frontend: Rating stats card shows متوسط التقييم (average rating)
✅ Frontend: RatingStatsPanel shows توزيع التقييمات (rating distribution)
✅ Frontend: RatingStatsPanel shows آخر التعليقات (recent comments)
critical_code_review_comments: chatbot.py correctly implements rating validation (1-5 range)
chatbot.py properly checks ticket ownership before allowing rating
chatbot.py prevents duplicate ratings with 'rating exists' check
my-pending-rating query correctly filters: user_id + status='resolved' + rating not exists
admin/rating-stats calculates distribution and average correctly
Chatbot.js checkPendingRating() called on chatbot open with token
RatingModal has proper data-testid attributes for testing
RatingStatsPanel in SupportTicketsTab.js shows distribution bars and recent comments
seed_data_creation: Created test support tickets with ratings (TEST_RATING, TEST_DUPLICATE, TEST_PENDING, TEST_STATS, TEST_NO_COMMENT, TEST_MODAL) during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support rating system fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/chatbot/rate-support (rating 1-5 + optional comment), GET /api/chatbot/my-pending-rating (returns resolved unrated ticket), GET /api/chatbot/admin/rating-stats (returns average, total, distribution, recent comments). RatingModal appears in Chatbot.js when checkPendingRating() finds a ticket. Admin sees RatingStatsPanel in SupportTicketsTab.js with expandable stats view.

user_flow.pending_rating_check: GET /api/chatbot/my-pending-rating - returns ticket if user has resolved unrated ticket
user_flow.rating_modal: RatingModal in Chatbot.js - appears when chatbot opens if pending rating exists
user_flow.star_selection: 5 star buttons with data-testid='rating-star-{n}', hover/click shows rating text

admin_flow.stats_panel: RatingStatsPanel in SupportTicketsTab.js - shows distribution bars and comments

admin_stats.stats_card: Shows متوسط التقييم with average value
admin_stats.recent_comments: List of recent ratings with comments
